scene: المنتج الحقيقي معروض على صينية مجلس سعودي أصيلة، أجواء دافئة، بدون أشخاص — بيكيز · A traditional Saudi majlis setting, featuring a classic low wooden table with intricate Arabesque patterns, set against a deep crimson red backdrop with a radial glow, characteristic of ALBAIK's signature color field. · Two identical 'التوأم' burgers, positioned prominently as the hero of the scene. · props: A traditional silver serving tray, possibly with subtle Arabesque engravings, placed on the table holding the two 'التوأم' burgers. The tray may also include a few decorative elements like small, elegant Arabic coffee cups and a couple of dates for authenticity, but without overpowering the focus on the burgers. · composition: The two burgers are placed side by side in the center of the tray, slightly angled towards the camera to reveal their full texture and layers. The silver tray's reflective surface enhances the glossy highlights on the burgers. The coffee cups and dates are positioned towards the edges of the tray to frame the burgers without drawing attention away from them. · light: A single hard key light from above and slightly to the front, creating crisp specular highlights on the burgers' golden-amber breaded fillets and the glossy sauce. The light reflects off the silver tray, adding a luxurious touch. The background glows with a radial vignette, transitioning from bright crimson at the center to dark maroon at the edges. · mood: Warm and inviting, with a celebratory tone. The traditional setting and rich color palette evoke a sense of cultural authenticity and hospitality, while the glossy, high-gloss photography style enhances the appetite appeal of the 'التوأم' burgers.
prompt:
[BRAND LOCK · identity invariant, placement and composition open]
The reference image teaches the بيكيز brand identity. Identity is invariant — tray viewpoint, element arrangement, and tungsten character are creative decisions.
Identity DNA: A loose pile of BROASTED golden-crispy boneless, skinless chicken-breast strips — irregular, knobbly, deeply golden tenders with a thick craggy fried crumb crust, served bare on a warm wooden board (no bun). 5 pieces per portion. Available regular or spicy (حرّاق, with the red chili-flame badge). Always plated to show the crunch and steam, with Albaik's white garlic ثومية and orange cocktail (مسحب) sauce as the dip alongside. SIGNATURE CUE — the product must read by its white garlic sauce (ثومية).
INTEGRATION: The product belongs to the still-life. Metallic elements reflect warm gold onto the product's edges; tungsten tints every surface — vessels, product, dates, textile — the same warmth; textile warm-gold thread rhymes with ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries..

[REALISM & CAPTURE CHARACTER]
Capture character: film_grain_warmth heritage cinema, photoreal, warm-toned film science, organic grain in shadow. Real metal patina (CS-18), genuine wood/textile, natural dates, honest ceramic. Material truth: crisp golden-brown crust with honest oil sheen and visible craggy texture; tender steam-moist interior where broken; true fried-food surface, never plastic-uniform; product-truth texture: broasted/crispy; signature white garlic sauce (ثومية). No Hollywood-Middle-East gloss.

[SCALE CALIBRATION]
Each strip ≈ 9–11 cm long, ≈ 2.5 cm wide; each breaded shrimp ≈ 4–5 cm. Scale-anchor = served as a small pile in a paper boat / on the combo plate; a strip ≈ 0.8× the ALBAIK can height laid horizontal; 3–4 strips fill one paper boat.. Render the size hierarchy honestly among the product and the cultural elements (per real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces object sizes).

[FRAMING & PROXIMITY]
Intimate tray proximity — the still-life fills the frame, edges falling soft. No dead space.

[COLOR & CONTRAST · brand-derived + authentic heritage]
Warm tungsten field plus authentic culturally-grounded tones from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (metal gold, textile deep-reds — real heritage colours, not borrowed accents). Anchored to ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. as the modern note.

[LIGHT & LENS · warm tungsten chiaroscuro, mood not spec]
Warm intimate tungsten — a cultural interior after sunset. Directional and moody with deep shadow in negative space — WARM and soft-edged, not hard editorial, so it reads intimate. Model chooses key direction, fill from below (surface reflection), shadow depth, optional gentle flicker. POPPING COLOR INTENT: rich warmth, metallic gold gleam, textile depth, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. as the modern note. Lens: portrait compression; model chooses depth across the tray.

[NATURAL PLACEMENT]
The product sits naturally beside the elements as if just set down — upright on its base or gently leaning. Elements rest in their natural positions. Not a perfect grid.

[COMPANION ELEMENTS · heritage built-in, restrained]
The cultural elements ARE the companions — RESTRAINED: model chooses the count (minimal trio, quartet, or expanded with a small detail at the edge) but never crowds. Singular pieces, drawn from real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces / One hero companion: the white ALBAIK garlic-sauce dip cup (the dip is the strips/shrimp ritual). Restrained extras: the fries bag, a lemon wedge for the shrimp. ONE hero companion only..

[SCENE · creative seed]

The tray may also include a few decorative elements like small, elegant Arabic coffee cups and a couple of dates for authenticity, but without overpowering the focus on the burgers. · composition: The two burgers are placed side by side in the center of the tray, slightly angled towards the camera to reveal their full texture and layers. The silver tray's reflective surface enhances the glossy highlights on the burgers. The coffee cups and dates are positioned towards the edges of the tray to frame the burgers without drawing attention away from them. · light: A single hard key light from above and slightly to the front, creating crisp specular highlights on the burgers' golden-amber breaded fillets and the glossy sauce. The light reflects off the silver tray, adding a luxurious touch. Heritage hospitality — the product welcomed onto a traditional tray. Model chooses: tray viewpoint (top-down, three-quarter elevated, near-eye-level intimate, low-angle); tray material; element arrangement and count (restrained); textile visibility (rug edge at lower frame, cushion in bokeh, near-absent).

[SUBJECT]
Authentic cultural elements per CS-13 / real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces (e.g. brass dallah + Najdi spout per CS-18, dates per CS-21, Najdi textile). The product reads as modern but welcome.

[BRAND CONSTRAINTS]
Single product hero. Cultural elements as singular supporting context — never multiples. No alcohol, no pork (CS-21). Authentic per CS-13. No humans. no cartoon/illustration/stylized rendering, no oversaturation, no plastic CGI uniformity, no borrowed reference colours, no readable text on neighbouring objects

[OUTPUT]
8K photoreal heritage commercial photography. Warm rich grade, ALBAIK crimson-red (the dominant field) paired with golden-yellow as the co-hero accent. Red governs the background/wordmark mass; yellow governs the call-to-action discs, the secondary wordmark, and the packaging pattern. This red+yellow pair is the locked brand primary; navy and white are secondaries. sharp. No overlay text, no watermark.

[SAUDI ADAPTATION — conditional]
authentic contemporary Saudi setting — true materials, never generic-Arabian sets the register. real Saudi-context materials — brass dallah, sadu textile, palm, true regional surfaces supplies the full majlis config per CS-15 (vessels CS-18, dates CS-21, Najdi textile with warm-gold thread rhyming with the brand colour). deepen Ramadan evening warmth or add Founding-Day green thread.

[CREATIVE VARIANCE DIRECTIVE]
Vary tray viewpoint, material, arrangement, element count (restrained), textile visibility, tungsten character. Hold constant: warm tungsten chiaroscuro, material texture, restraint, CS-13 authenticity. Each render a different majlis moment.
